**Path:** (e.g., `/vpn/media/backdoor.php`)

**Type:** webshell / backdoor / persistence / other

**Context:** (Which CVE exploitation campaign? Which threat actor? Source?)

**Content indicators:** (What patterns identify this as malicious? e.g., `<?php eval(`, `system(`)

**Should existing stock files at this path be allowlisted?** Yes / No
